query:
UPDATE hops
               SET origin_name    = ?,
                   dest_name      = ?,
                   start_date     = ?,
                   end_date       = ?,
                   origin_lat     = ?,
                   origin_lng     = ?,
                   origin_country = ?,
                   dest_lat       = ?,
                   dest_lng       = ?,
                   dest_country   = ?,
                   travel_type    = ?,
                   updated_at     = datetime('now')
             WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?
